old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-3gqi","title":"Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic","description":"Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic - Epic to track all enhancements to LICHEN simulation infrastructure including debugging capabilities, validation tests, and documentation for distributed testing without hardware requirements. This epic encompasses all the foundational work needed to validate the heterogeneous mesh network approach before requiring actual hardware deployment.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:18:15.665267Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:18:34.491295Z"}

new_value: All child tasks completed: LoRa/SX1262 model fidelity + easyDMA/RX fixes, GNSS/GPS.cs + LR1110 with NMEA/epoching, BLE/USBD peripheral models implemented and wired in REPL/resc, comprehensive parallel tests in sim/ and Renode integration passing, docs updated. Simulation infrastructure now provides complete Zephyr/Renode fidelity for BLE, USBD, GNSS, LoRa enabling hardware-free distributed mesh validation.
